sections.note: This resume was written in react & tailwind, ssg using gatsby and exported to pdf with playwright and brought to you through github actions artifacts. source code is available in my github

summary.content: I reason from first principles, I formalize requirements, identify invariants, and translate them into clean backend systems. I work comfortably with databases, APIs, and data pipelines, and I’m especially strong at rigorous mathematical thinking and building reliable abstractions under uncertainty. I learn new domains quickly, take ownership of loosely defined problems, and proactively build tooling when needed. I enjoy work that demands both theoretical clarity and strong engineering execution.

items.title: Backend & Distributed Systems
items.description: ASP.NET Core, Node.js, Event-Driven Architecture, Microservices, RabbitMQ

items.title: Machine Learning & Data Pipelines
items.description: Vision-Language Models (CLIP, Qwen), Object Detection (YOLO), OpenCV, Semantic Search, Scrapy

items.title: Infrastructure, DevOps & Testing
items.description: Docker, GitHub Actions, CMake, Playwright, gTest, Boost, Google Fruit

items.title: Multimodal Asset Catalog Pipeline
items.description: Local-first data pipeline utilizing vision-language models and semantic search to ingest, process, and organize large-scale image and document collections.
highlights: Integrated VL models (CLIP, Qwen) and YOLO for automated asset tagging and zero-shot classification
Implemented vector-based semantic search and OCR for complex multimodal retrieval
Developed custom web scraping ingestion pipelines utilizing Scrapy
Architected local-inference infrastructure ensuring offline processing capability

items.title: Event-Driven Logistics Platform
items.description: A distributed .NET microservices platform managing order orchestration, parcel routing, and physical label printing. with a React Native mobile application for warehouse operators.
highlights: Saga orchestration, resilient messaging, and observability
Expo RN app with react-query w/ graphql
On Premise QL-700 controller for package labeling

items.title: Parking Alert System
items.description: A real-time computer vision system that monitors live CCTV feeds to detect vehicles blocking entrances. It filters out false positives and signals an on-premise controller to broadcast custom audio warnings through Bluetooth speakers.
highlights: Built the core detection pipeline in C++ using OpenCV and YOLOv4
Managed asynchronous system events using RabbitMQ pub/sub
Packaged and deployed the entire stack via Docker and automated CI/CD

math_work.title: Selected Mathematical Work
math_work.description: A selected math proofs portfolio on topology, complex analysis, number theory.

items.title: Noetherian Spaces
items.summary: Noetherian topological spaces, behavior and irreducible decomposition arguments.

items.title: Baire Category Theorem
items.summary: completeness, category, and structural topological arguments.

items.title: Topologist's Sine Curve
items.summary: Analysis of a classical counterexample, proving connectedness, closures, and limiting behavior.

items.title: Injective Entire Functions
items.summary: Proof that injective entire functions are linear.

items.title: Arithmetic Topology
items.summary: Topology flavored proof work connecting arithmetic sequences with topology.

items.title: Euler Phi Function
items.summary: Elementary number theoretic proof work around divisibility, prime decompositions, and arithmetic functions.

education.degree: B.Sc. in Mathematics with Computer Science

courses.title: Intro to metric and topological spaces
